headline: What Leidos Holdings (LDOS)'s AI Health Push and UFO ETF Inclusion Means For Shareholders
summary: In recent days, Leidos Holdings has been highlighted for QTC Health Services’ use of mobile clinics, AI-enabled tools, and telehealth to extend healthcare access to rural U.S. communities, while investors also await an earnings report with an expected EPS of $2.94, slightly lower than the same quarter last year. At the same time, Leidos’ growing contract backlog, efficiency gains, share repurchases, and inclusion in the new Tuttle Capital UFO Disclosure ETF are underscoring its role at the...
